title: callicarpa oshimensis var. oshimensis
intro: Callicarpa oshimensis var. oshimensis, also known as Purple Smoke, is a flowering plant species in the balsam family Lamiaceae. This plant is native to Japan and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its berries, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions. The berries of Callicarpa oshimensis var. oshimensis have been used to treat inflammation and as an antiseptic, and they are also said to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The berries can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusible, making it a versatile herbal remedy for promoting health and well-being.
